per_report_classification.note: 192 SVG coordinate lines (TEMPLATE_DRIFT: reconstruction layout coordinates differ from original); 34 cluster_id naming lines (DATA_DRIFT: CLU-FUNCTIONAL vs original CLU-01 format); 4 lineage_status lines (DATA_DRIFT: DOMAIN-01/16 STRONG vs original EXACT)
192 SVG coordinate lines (TEMPLATE_DRIFT: same as tier1_evidence); 2 lineage table lines (DATA_DRIFT: DOMAIN-01 EXACT→STRONG, DOMAIN-16 EXACT→STRONG)

14 content lines. Hero rationale uses structural path (13/13 structural) instead of semantic path (5/17 backed). Badge text, truth text, synthesis text all differ. Root cause: decision surface builder hero rationale text generation uses a different semantic context path than tier1/tier2 builders.

root_causes.description: Semantic topology SVG coordinates differ: DETERMINISTIC_RECONSTRUCTION layout has different node positions and cluster bounding boxes than original semantic_topology_layout.json. Affects 192 diff lines in tier1_evidence and tier2_diagnostic.
root_causes.remediation_path: Extract original SVG coordinates from canonical report HTML (inline SVG visible in canonical), reconstruct semantic_topology_layout.json from canonical report.

root_causes.description: Cluster ID naming convention mismatch. Original model used CLU-01..CLU-05 (numeric); reconstruction used CLU-FUNCTIONAL..CLU-INTEGRATION (descriptive). Affects domain card subtitles in tier1_evidence (34 lines).
root_causes.remediation_path: Update semantic_topology_model.json cluster_ids to CLU-01..CLU-05 format matching original. Map: CLU-01=FUNCTIONAL, CLU-02=?, CLU-03=INFRASTRUCTURE, CLU-04=INFRASTRUCTURE/OPERATIONAL, CLU-05=CROSS-CUTTING/INTEGRATION.

root_causes.description: lineage_status mismatch for DOMAIN-01 and DOMAIN-16. Original: EXACT for both. Reconstruction: STRONG for both. Affects domain cards and lineage table (4+2 lines).
root_causes.remediation_path: Set DOMAIN-01 lineage_status=EXACT and DOMAIN-16 lineage_status=EXACT in semantic_topology_model.json.

root_causes.description: Decision surface hero rationale and truth text use structural rendering path instead of semantic path. Canonical shows '5/17 semantic domains backed'; generated shows '13 of 13 structural evidence groups'. Root cause: decision surface builder conditional logic for semantic vs structural hero rationale differs from canonical generation session.
root_causes.remediation_path: Investigate _build_decision_surface() semantic context consumption. Identify which code path produces the '5/17 semantic' text in canonical and ensure semantic_context from _build_semantic_report_context() is consumed for hero rationale.

recommended_next_action: PI.LENS.REPORT-RENDERER.DRIFT-REMEDIATION.01 — remediate RC-02 (cluster_ids), RC-03 (lineage_status) in semantic_topology_model.json; extract canonical SVG coordinates from canonical reports for RC-01; investigate decision surface builder semantic context path for RC-04.
